## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.1

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Fixes a Home Assistant 2026.7 thread-safety error during the deferred startup refresh.
- Keeps valid child-device rows when X-Sense reports a serial alias without a separate device ID.

### 🧩 Python X-Sense
- Clarifies that the bundled Python X-Sense client is a temporary compatibility step.
- Keeps the long-term direction pointed back to the upstream Python X-Sense package once it has the same supported behavior.
